race.description: Fred Vella Tyre & Crash Repair Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: HOOKED ON WEALTH (13) is a frustrating galloper but has peaks that can manage these if he's on his A-game. Has been flashing home all throughout this prep without being able to land the winning blow. Gets in light with the 3kg claim and will be looking to round them up. FREE BEER (1) has been solid since resuming and should be hitting his straps now fourth-up. Gets a 2kg claim to aid the big weight and drops back to a winning trip. Expecting him to make his presence felt. ORTHIES (9) has been beaten narrowly in his first two starts in the new colours and finds another suitable contest. Gets a key switch in Holder. Have to include. RICHE D'AMOUR (6) shoulders a similar profile to HOF and has proven as equally as frustrating for his supporters. Will undoubtedly drift back from his draw and be saved for the final shot at them. Watch for him flashing. GRAND HOST (11) was much better third-up and is open to further improvement. One of the exotics.
